name: Oatmeal Pudding Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Mix flour with baking soda.
3. Combine butter, both sugars, and the pudding mix in a large bowl. Beat until smooth and creamy.
4. Add eggs. Mix well.
5. Stir in flour and oatmeal. The batter will be stiff.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of batter onto ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 8 minutes.
